overview: SR University (formerly SR Engineering College - SREC), located in Ananthasagar, Hasanparthy, Warangal, Telangana, is a premier private university established in 2002 and upgraded to a private state university in 2020 under the Sri Rajeshwara Educational Society. Spread across a 150-acre campus, the university is known for its specialized technology curriculum, innovation ecosystem, and one of India's largest Technology Business Incubators (TBI) in a tier-2 city.
accreditation: Tier-1 NBA accredited; NAAC accredited; ICAR accredited for Agriculture programs.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Standardized baseline fee structure as per state norms

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on TG EAPCET counseling, JEE Main scores, and management quota admissions depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow TG EAPCET counseling schedules and university academic timelines.

campus.hostelFees: ₹85,000 – ₹1,20,000 per year depending on sharing and AC/non-AC selection
campus.specialNote: SR University hosts one of India's largest Technology Business Incubators in a tier-2 city and maintains international engineering partnerships.

scholarships.meritScholarships: 50% – 100% tuition fee waivers for top JEE Main and TG EAPCET scorers
scholarships.sportsQuota: Fee concessions for state and national-level sports achievers
scholarships.alumniBenefits: Fee reductions for children of university staff and alumni

contact.address: SR University, Ananthasagar, Hasanparthy, Warangal, Telangana – 506371, India
